title: Aetti Enga Pora Lyrics Vanmham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aetti Enga Pora
Singer(s): Nivas, M.M.Manasi
Music: Thaman.S
Lyricist: Yugabharathi
Movie: Vanmham (2014)

Aetti Enga Pora
yedho sollippora
aasa vachcha enna
eppappaaru thalli pora.

Neethaan minjipora
venaam kenja pora
thaali thandha pinne
sollu enna pannapora.

Maane neethaan anjapora
maarbil saanji konjapora
venaa neethaan sikkapora
veeram thaenji sokkapora.

Aetti Enga Pora
yedho sollippora
aasa vachcha enna
eppappaaru thalli pora.

Vellaadu polathaaney
irundheney naanum munna.
Kaangeyam kaalaipola
ennai neeyum maaththi ninna.

Oru paarva ena paaaththu
usuroda enna konna.
Aagaaraththa marandhaen
un anbil naaney
kan thookkaththa thorandhaen.

Edharkkaaga vazhkai endru
enakkule kelvi ondru
unakaanththaaney vazhkai
endru sonnen indru.

Unmela vachcha aasa
orunaalil vandhadhilla.
Aarelu senmam senja
thavamendre sollven pulla.

Enai kaakkum varamneeye
unarndhaney mella mella.
Dheiveegaththa ariya un kannukulla
poorveegaththa arinjaen.

Unaipola yaarumilla
irundhaalum thaevayilla
manasodu neeyum thangipoga
saave illa.

Aetti Enga Pora
yedho sollippora
aasa vachcha enna
eppappaaru thalli pora.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Aetti Enga Pora?

The song is sung by Manasi MM and Nivas.

Which movie features the song Aetti Enga Pora?

The song is from the Tamil movie Vanmham, released in 2014.

Who composed the music for Aetti Enga Pora?

The music was composed by the renowned composer Thaman S.

What is the theme of the song Aetti Enga Pora?

The song carries an energetic and motivational theme, reflecting cultural vibrancy.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Vanmham?

The lead roles are played by Vijay Sethupathi and Sunaina.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aetti Enga Pora from the 2014 Tamil movie Vanmham, starring Vijay Sethupathi and Sunaina, is a vibrant and energetic folk number. Composed by Thaman S, the song features the dynamic vocals of Manasi MM and Nivas, with lyrics penned by Yugabharathi. The track captures the essence of cultural pride and determination, resonating with its motivational and celebratory tone. It stands out as a memorable piece in the movie's soundtrack, reflecting the emotions and themes of the narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aetti Enga Pora from the movie Vanmham is a captivating folk number that resonates with energy and cultural vibrancy. Composed by the talented Thaman S, this song features the dynamic vocals of Manasi MM and Nivas, bringing life to Yugabharathi's evocative lyrics. Experience the essence of Tamil Nadu's rich musical heritage through this enthralling track.
stanzaMeanings: We are going somewhere, saying something, but what will happen to our hopes?
You are the one who is going away, don’t say what I should do after you leave.
You are the one who is scared, you are the one who is getting lost, don’t you feel the courage that is fading away?
I was like a winner, but now I am just a shadow. You have changed me like the changing times.
With just one glance, you took my breath away. I forgot everything in your love and revealed my heart.
What is life for? I have a question inside me, and I said today that life is for you.
The hope I had for you didn’t come true on that day. I will say that I will endure the pain of separation.
The blessing that protects me is your awareness, slowly and gently. I realized the divine nature in your eyes.
There is no one like you, and even if there is, I don’t need them. My heart will not let you go, there is no escape.
